# Asset Credits

## Sprites & tiles (CC0 / public domain)
- "DungeonTileset II" character & tile sprites by **0x72** (Robert Norenberg) —
  https://0x72.itch.io/dungeontileset-ii — released under CC0 (no attribution
  required; credited here voluntarily).
- Obtained as pre-sliced PNG strips via the mirror
  https://github.com/ViRb3/game2d-dungeon

## Fonts (SIL Open Font License)
- "Anton" and "Barlow Condensed" from Google Fonts (OFL).

Ambient effects (torch glow, fog, particles, lighting) and per-character
palette variants are generated at runtime from these base sprites.
